title: clerodendrum squamatum var. rumphianum
intro: Clerodendrum squamatum var. rumphianum is a variety of the Clerodendrum squamatum plant, a type of flowering plant in the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as the Lamiaceae or mint family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum squamatum var. rumphianum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make salves and ointments for topical application.
